name: KORE Group Holdings, Inc.
business: KORE offers IoT connectivity services and IoT solutions to enterprise customers, enabling them to deploy, manage, and scale their IoT applications globally. The company's IoT platform is delivered in partnership with major mobile network operators and provides secure connectivity to mobile and fixed devices. Revenue is primarily from IoT Connectivity (78% in 2025) and IoT Solutions (22%).

exposures.sentence: We offer IoT connectivity to the Internet ( IoT Connectivity ) and other IoT solutions to our customers.

We provide IoT Connectivity and IoT Solutions to enterprise customers across several key end markets, comprised of (i) Connected Health, (ii) Fleet Management, (iii) Asset Monitoring, (iv) Retail Communications Services and (v) Industrial IoT.

The 5G market may take longer to materialize than we expect or, if it does materialize rapidly, we may not be able to meet the development schedule and other customer demands.
Our eSIM can provide global and local connectivity on a single SIM, which can be remotely updated with a preferred carrier profile over-the-air or remotely.

In order to support these new customers and the increasing number of 5G use cases, we must continue to make significant investments in network capacity, infrastructure, and edge virtualization solutions.

catalysts.event: Merger with KONA Parent to take KORE private at $9.25 per share
catalysts.sentence: KORE expects the transaction to close during the second or third quarter of 2026.
